sections.paragraph:
Original: פּח

Transliteration: pach

Phonetic: pakh

BDB Definition:

  1. bird trap, trap, snare
    1. bird trap (literal)
    2. of calamities, plots, source or agent of calamity (figuratively)
  2. plate (of metal)

Origin: from H6351

TWOT entry: 1759a,1759b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
